COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Aug-30-2004 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as reassignment from the Presiding Judge Department for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Philip Kilduff, Esq. for Plaintiff: Discover Bank.
No appearance by the Defendant: Noemi P. Mendoza.
9:25 a.m. Exhibit 1-Declaration of Heidi Leo----------ID/EVID.
The Court having heard the testimony and considered the evidence, grants judgment as follows:
Judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant as follows:
Principal $5,057.46
Prejudgment Interest $258.44
Costs $198.30
Attorney's fees $900.00
Total $6,414.20
Judgment signed in open court.
Counsel stipulated for return of exhibit.
